fix_command: sudo sed -i 's/^PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && sudo systemctl restart ssh

description: Запрет авторизации по паролю в SSH
fix_command: sudo sed -i 's/^PasswordAuthentication.*/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && sudo systemctl restart ssh
